sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, ulid_string FixedString(26), created_at DateTime64(3));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, '01GNB2S2FGN2P93QPXDNB4EN2R', now()), (2, '01GNB2S2FGN2P93QPXDNB4EN2R', now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY), (3, '', now());

SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE ULIDStringToDateTime(ulid_string) IS NOT NULL), EXISTS(SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE ULIDStringToDateTime(ulid_string) > toDateTime64('2022-12-28 00:40:38.000', 3));
SELECT count() FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS(SELECT ULIDStringToDateTime(ulid_string) AS dt WHERE dt > toDateTime64('2022-12-28 00:40:38.000', 3));
SELECT ULIDStringToDateTime(ulid_string) AS dt, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY dt HAVING dt IS NOT NULL;
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ULIDStringToDateTime(ulid_string)) AS year, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY year HAVING year IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT ULIDStringToDateTime(ulid_string) AS dt FROM test_table WHERE ulid_string != '';
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM temp_table WHERE dt < now()), (SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM temp_table WHERE dt IS NULL) = 0);

SELECT ULIDStringToDateTime('01GNB2S2FGN2P93QPXDNB4EN2R') AS timestamp_val WHERE EXISTS(SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE timestamp_val IS NOT NULL) AND timestamp_val > toDateTime64('2022-12-28 00:40:37.600', 3);
